untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order placement logic (limit orders at specific price distances, execution tracking, time-based expiry) which is not expressible using only technical indicator conditions. The core concept involves placing limit orders at buy_limit_distance_from_ltp_percent=0.5% and sell_limit_distance_from_ltp_percent=0.5% from last traded price, with 5-minute expiry and tracking execution vs. price movement. This requires position management and order execution mechanics beyond the scope of indicator-based entry/exit rules.
translation_notes: This signal describes a trading tactic (limit order placement strategy with execution uncertainty) rather than a technical indicator-based trading rule. The entry conditions depend on: (1) identifying a reversion zone (requires price forecasting logic not available), (2) order execution status, and (3) time elapsed since order placement. The exit is triggered by order execution or expiry (5 minutes). Standard backtesting rules cannot model limit order fills, partial execution, or time-decay without order simulation logic.
